mapper.select: SELECT spu_id AS spuId, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_valid = 1 THEN user_id END) AS totalBuyUser, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_valid = 1 AND is_first_buy = 1 THEN user_id END) AS firstBuyUser, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN is_valid = 1 AND is_first_buy = 0 THEN user_id END) AS repurchaseUser, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_valid = 1 THEN 1 END) AS totalOrderCnt, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN is_valid = 1 THEN pay_amount END), 0) AS totalPayAmount FROM user_spu_pay_detail WHERE DATE(pay_time) = #{statDate} GROUP BY spu_id
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO spu_daily_repurchase_stat ( spu_id, stat_date, total_buy_user, first_buy_user, repurchase_user, repurchase_rate, total_order_cnt, total_pay_amount, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.spuId}, #{item.statDate}, #{item.totalBuyUser}, #{item.firstBuyUser}, #{item.repurchaseUser}, #{item.repurchaseRate}, #{item.totalOrderCnt}, #{item.totalPayAmount}, NOW() )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_buy_user = VALUES(total_buy_user), first_buy_user = VALUES(first_buy_user), repurchase_user = VALUES(repurchase_user), repurchase_rate = VALUES(repurchase_rate), total_order_cnt = VALUES(total_order_cnt), total_pay_amount = VALUES(total_pay_amount)
